creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #5)
> Sorry Chris I won't be able to fulfill this PR and I am seeing an error in
> the current form. Returning to the pool.
> 
> => Attempting to fetch
> https://download.gnome.org/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon/ICON-
> GNOMEAlternatives.tar.xz
> fetch:
> https://download.gnome.org/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon/ICON-
> GNOMEAlternatives.tar.xz: Not Found

D'OH! I had USES= tar:xz in the Makefile. :/
I've recreated the Makefile accordingly, and tested the outcome.
Works fine now! :-)

Sorry, and thanks!

--Chris
